title: Principal Plant Manager at JSW Steel Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at JSW Steel Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with JSW Steel Global Group! We are hiring a Plant Manager for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About JSW Steel Global Group:
JSW Steel Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel Global Group!
